communityPost.body: Greetings all. Fabulous February awaits full of lessons, patience, and insights to foretelling. TY Alma for the efforts past, current, and future.
I downloaded the substack app just for you with an Ashton 898 on deck.

Two things:
1) I'm collecting datas, job, family etc. soon I come I start to write the first weekly analysis posts. In those posts there will be advanced stuffs just like what you saw on twitter, but I will be more detailed. 
Weekly posts are only to set the tone for the week, what we can wait, and look how the daily positionings diverging from them if any. 

2) Everyday I will create a daily thread in this chat. Pls use that as daily chat to avoid chaos here. And there you can discuss, share ideas, charts etc. anything. 
No rules. Only one rule: don't attack on each other. If there is a conflict, solve it in private. As you could read in my welcome post. Anything else... even memes and cursing is allowed, but of course... without ruining the whole conversation. Respect to each other. 

I won't always be here online during the whole day. If I intraday trade, or anything, I will tell it before the session starts. 
If you have questions for me specifically, tag me, and when I'm at desk, I will answer them. 
And you can also try to help each other, as there are a lot of high knowledge plp among us :) 

kind regards,
~A
